codeReview.summary: The implementation satisfies the assigned contract: static thinking indicators in MessageList/InputBar were replaced with ink-spinner, running agents in AgentSidebar now render a spinner while non-running states keep static dots, and rerender-based tests verify spinner unmount behavior when thinking/disabled flips false.

issues.description: The test named "full App flow: spinner shows during thinking, stops on completion" does not actually drive a thinking->completion transition; it only asserts initial no-spinner state and includes unused flow variables, so its title overstates covered behavior.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and skill context for feature tui-animations. Contract behavior is implemented correctly and is adequately covered by focused component tests; one non-blocking test-quality issue was noted in the integration-style test naming/assertions.
